why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.

why.tableTitle: Me pēhea te whakataurite a Chatforia

col.textnow: Ka rerekē i runga i te pūkete

history.voice: Herenga / i runga i te pūkete

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

free.q: Is the Free plan really free?
free.a: Yes. The Free plan includes a Chatforia number, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay on Free as long as you like, or upgrade to remove ads and unlock more features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your message history — perfect for everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority support for heavy users.

esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your country and device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app.

cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.

family.a: Family packs create a shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can invite or remove members and set limits per person.

account.q: Me pēhea taku hanga, tiki anō rānei i taku pūkete?
account.a: Tārua te taupānga, whakamahia rānei te paetukutuku, pāwhiri "Hanga pūkete", whakamana tō īmēra/waea. Hei whakahoki, whakamahia te "Kua wareware kupuhipa".

privacy.q: Kei te whakamunatia ngā karere mai i te tīmatanga ki te mutunga?
privacy.a: Āe. Ka whakamunatia ngā karere me ngā waea mai i te tīmatanga ki te mutunga i te taunoa. Ko koe anake me te kaiwhiwhi e taea te pānui i ēnei.

translate.q: E pēhea ana te mahi a te whakamāori ohorere?
translate.a: Whakahohe i te "Auto-translate" i ngā Tautuhinga → Ahua & Reo. Ka whakamāoritia e mātou i runga i te pūrere mēnā ka taea, ki te kore, mā ngā API haumaru me ngā raraunga iti rawa.

contact.a: Whakapā mai ki a mātou i support@chatforia.com. Tukuna mai ngā whakaahua mata me tō taupānga putanga.

gettingStarted.title: Tīmatanga
gettingStarted.subtitle: He hou koe ki Chatforia? E whakaatu ana tēnei aratohu tere i ngā mea matua kia taea ai e koe te whai hua i roto i ngā meneti.

alert.text: Ka tipu tēnei aratohu i a mātou e whakarewa ana i ngā āhuatanga hou. Mēnā he mea e ngaro ana, whakamōhio mai mā

section1.title: 1) Waihangahia tō pūkete
section1.prefsStart: I roto i te taupānga, whakatuwherahia ngā Tautuhinga kia tautuhia ō manakohanga

section2.title: 2) Tīmatahia te karere
section2.item1: Waihangahia he DM, he Rōpū rānei, ā, tukuna tō karere tuatahi.
section2.item2: Whakamahia te whakamāoritanga ohorere ki te kōrero puta noa i ngā reo neke atu i te 100.
section2.item3: Whakamātau i ngā karere ka ngaro me ngā rīpiti pānui i te Kōtaha → Tūmataitinga.

section3.title: 3) Haere whakamua
section3.item1: Ka taea e koe te whakahou ki tētahi mahere utu i ngā wā katoa i roto i te taupānga.
section3.item2: Kia takiuru koe, ka taea e koe te hono i ētahi atu pūrere, me te whakarite tārua haumaru kua whakamunatia mai i ngā Tautuhinga o te taupānga.
section3.item2Part1: Kia takiuru koe, ka taea e koe te hono i ētahi atu pūrere, me te whakarite tārua haumaru kua whakamunatia mai i ngā Tautuhinga o te taupānga.

howItWorks.title: Me pēhea te mahi a Chatforia
howItWorks.intro: I hangaia a Chatforia kia māmā, kia tere, kia wātea hoki te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero. He torutoru noa ngā hipanga hei tīmata.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Rēhita mā tō īmēra, tō ingoa kaiwhakamahi rānei hei waihanga i tō pūkete Chatforia.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Hono atu ki ētahi atu mā te kōwhiri i ngā hononga, te tīmata rānei i ngā kōrero hou.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ka tukuna wawe ngā karere kia māmā ai te wheako whakawhitiwhiti kōrero.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Ka āwhina te whakamāoritanga kua whakaurua ki ngā kaiwhakamahi ki te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero puta noa i ngā reo rerekē.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Whakahaere i ō manakohanga, ō hononga, me ō tautuhinga whakawhitiwhiti kōrero.

safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.

tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.

whyMessaging.title: He aha ai e tino hira ake ana ngā papa karere i ngā wā katoa
whyMessaging.intro: Kua noho ngā papa karere hei kotahi o ngā taputapu tino hira mō te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero i te ao o nāianei. Mai i ngā kōrero whaiaro ki ngā whakawhitinga pakihi, ka āhei ngā taupānga karere i te tangata kia noho honohono tonu, kia whai hua hoki.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Ka whakawhirinaki te tangata ki ngā taupānga karere mō te whakawhiti kōrero ā-ia rā ki ngā hoa, ki te whānau, ki ngā hoa mahi rānei. Ahakoa he whakahou tere, he kōrero roa rānei, ka whakarato te karere i tētahi huarahi māmā, ngawari hoki hei noho pūhonohono.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Ko tētahi o ngā painga matua o ngā papa karere ko tō rātou tere. Ka tukuna tonu ngā karere, ā, ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakawhiti kōrero i te wā tūturu. Nā tēnei taumata ngāwari, kua riro te karere hei tikanga whakawhiti kōrero e tino manakohia ana e te tokomaha.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Ka hono ngā papanga karere i ngā tāngata puta noa i te ao. Mā te whai hononga ipurangi, ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakawhiti kōrero ahakoa te wāhi, ā, ka māmā ake te hanga hononga me te mahi ngātahi ā-ao.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: E aro ana ngā papa karere o nāianei ki te tuku mana ki ngā kaiwhakamahi ki ā rātou raraunga me ā rātou kōrero. Mā ngā āhuatanga pērā i te whakamunatanga, ngā tautuhinga tūmataiti, me ngā whakahaere karere ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakawhiti kōrero me te māia.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Ka haere tonu te whanaketanga o te karere me ngā āhuatanga hou pērā i ngā whakautu ā-AI, te whakamāori, me te tiritiri pāpāho maha. I te ahunga whakamua o te hangarau, ka kaha ake, ka whānui ake hoki ngā papa karere.
whyMessaging.outro: Kua hangaia a Chatforia me ēnei mātāpono i te hinengaro, e tuku ana i tētahi wheako karere tere, haumaru, me te māmā ki te kaiwhakamahi mō tētahi ao hono.

global.title: Te Anamata o te Whakawhitiwhiti Kōrero ā-Ao
global.intro: Kua tere te whanaketanga o te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero i roto i ngā tekau tau kua pahure. Ko ngā mea i hiahiatia ai ngā waea, ngā hui ā-tinana rānei, ka taea ināianei te mahi wawe mā ngā papanga karere. I te haere tonu o te hangarau, kei te tere ake, kei te māmā ake te uru, ā, kei te whānui ake te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero ā-ao.
global.barriersDesc: Ko tētahi o ngā panonitanga nui rawa atu i roto i te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero ko te whakaiti i ngā ārai ā-takiwā. Ka taea e te tangata ināianei te hono atu ki ētahi atu puta noa i te ao i te wā tata tonu. Ahakoa mō ngā kōrero whaiaro, mō ngā pakihi, mō te mahi ngātahi rānei, kua tino whakaitia e ngā papa karere te aukatinga o te tawhiti.
global.translationTitle: Te Tūranga o te Hangarau Whakamāori
global.translationDesc: Ko te reo i ngā tikanga tuku iho tētahi o ngā ārai nui rawa atu ki te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero ā-ao. I tēnei rā, ka āwhina ngā taputapu whakamāori kua whakaurua ki te whakakī i taua āputa. Ka āhei ngā papa pērā i a Chatforia i ngā kaiwhakamahi ki te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero māmā ake ahakoa e kōrero ana rātou i ngā reo rerekē, ā, ka waihanga i ngā huarahi hou mō te hononga me te mārama.
global.realtimeDesc: Ko te tere tētahi āhuatanga matua e ārahi ana i te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero o nāianei. E tūmanako ana ngā kaiwhakamahi kia tukuna wawe ngā karere, ā, ko ngā hanganga hou e tautoko ana i taua tūmanako. Ko te karere ā-wā tūturu e whakaahei ana i ngā kōrero tūturu, ngāwari hoki.
global.privacyDesc: I te pikinga ake o te whakawhiti kōrero matihiko, kei te piki haere te hiranga o te tūmataiti me te haumarutanga. E hiahia ana ngā kaiwhakamahi kia mōhio kei te tiakina ā rātou kōrero. Ko ngā āhuatanga pērā i te whakamunatanga me ngā tautuhinga e whakahaerehia ana e te kaiwhakamahi e āwhina ana ki te tautoko i tētahi wheako whakawhiti kōrero haumaru ake.
global.futureTitle: He aha te mea e whai ake
global.futureDesc: Ko te anamata o te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero ā-ao ka whai pea i ngā taputapu matatau ake, pērā i ngā karere āwhina AI, te whakamāori kua whakapai ake, me ngā wheako kaiwhakamahi kua whakarei ake. I te whanaketanga haere o te hangarau, ka haere tonu te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero kia māmā ake te whakamahi, kia wātea hoki.
global.outro: Ko ngā papa pērā i a Chatforia he wāhanga o tēnei panoni, ā, e āwhina ana i te hunga kia hono ngawari atu puta noa i ngā reo me ngā rohe.

index.title: Blog a Chatforia
index.intro: Tūhuratia ngā mōhiotanga mō te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero, te haumaru ipurangi, me te āhua e hono ana te hangarau karere i te hunga puta noa i te ao.
index.post1: Me Pēhea te Kōrero Haumaru Ipurangi
index.post2: Te Anamata o te Whakawhitiwhiti Kōrero ā-Ao
index.post3: He aha te take o ngā papanga karere

chatSafely.title: Me pēhea te kōrero haumaru ipurangi
chatSafely.intro: Kua māmā ake te whakawhiti kōrero ipurangi i ngā wā katoa ki te hono atu ki ngā tāngata puta noa i te ao. Ahakoa kei te tuku karere koe ki ō hoa, kei te tūtaki ki ngā tāngata hou, kei te mahi ngātahi rānei i ngā mahi ngaio, he wāhanga nui ngā papanga karere i tō tātou oranga ia rā. Heoi, he mea nui kia noho haumaru ipurangi, kia mau tonu hoki te hononga.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Kia Mataara ki ngā Tinihanga
scams.body: He maha ngā wā ka whakamahi ngā kaiwhakapohehe i ngā papa karere hei whakapohehe i ngā kaiwhakamahi kia tuku i ō rātou pārongo whaiaro, kia tuku moni rānei. Kia tūpato ki ngā karere e tino ātaahua ana kia pono, pērā i ngā tuku ohorere, ngā tono ohorere, ngā hononga kāore i te mōhiotia. Me whakamana tonu ko wai te tangata e kōrero ana koe i mua i te mahi i tētahi mea.

responsibly.title: Whakawhitiwhiti Kōrero Whai Haepapa" ly
responsibly.body: Ka āwhina te whakawhitiwhiti kōrero whai whakaaro ki te waihanga i tētahi taiao haumaru ake mō te katoa. Kia karo i te whai wāhi ki ngā kōrero kino, whakaparahako rānei, ā, kia āta whakaaro ki te pānga o ō kupu ki ētahi atu. Ka whai wāhi ngā whakawhitinga whai hua ki te whakapai ake i te wheako mō ngā kaiwhakamahi katoa.

whySafety.title: He aha te take o te haumaru ipurangi
whySafety.body: I te tipu haere tonu o te whakawhiti kōrero matihiko, ka tino hira ake te pupuri i te haumaru me te whakawhirinaki. Mā te whai i ngā tikanga haumaru taketake me te whakamahi i ngā taputapu e wātea ana, ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te pārekareka ki ngā painga o te tuku karere, ā, ka whakaiti i ngā tūraru.

chatSafely.conclusion: Ehara i te mea me mōhiohanga hangarau matatau kia noho haumaru ai koe ipurangi—he mōhio, he tūpato, he whakatau tika noa iho. Mā ngā tikanga tika, ka taea e koe te whakawhiti kōrero me te māia, ā, haumaru.

about.title: Mō Chatforia
about.description: He karere haumaru, maha-ā-reo a Chatforia me te whakamunatanga mutunga-ki-mutunga, te whakamāori ohorere, me ngā karanga oro/ataata. He māmā tā mātou whāinga: hei āwhina i te hunga kia hono—haumaru, tūmataiti, ā-whānui i ngā reo.
about.valuesTitle: Ngā mea e whakanuia ana e mātou

values.privacy: Tuatahi te tūmataitinga: Whakamunatanga mutunga-ki-mutunga hei taunoa.
values.access: Tuwhera mō te katoa: Whakamāori aunoa i ngā reo neke atu i te 100.
values.control: Whakahaere: He kōwhiringa ngā karere ka ngaro me ngā tiwhikete pānui.
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages and read receipts are optional.

about.howDescription: Messages are encrypted on your device before they leave it. Translation, backups, and device sync are designed to minimize what our servers can see.
about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
about.controlDesc: Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: Mō ngā pātai pāpāho, whakapā mai ki a mātou i
press.boilerplateBody: He taupānga karere matua-tūmataiti a Chatforia e māmā ai te kōrero whakawhiti-ā-reo. Ko ngā karere mutunga-ki- -mutunga kua whakamunatia hei taunoa, ā, kei roto he whakamāori e tautoko ana i ngā reo neke atu i te 100 i te wā tūturu. Ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakahohe i ngā karere ka ngaro, te pupuri i ngā rīpeka pānui hei kōwhiringa, me te whakakōtui i ngā pūrere katoa. Kei te wātea mō iOS, Android, me te paetukutuku.
press.assetsSubtitle: Ngā tohu āhua, ngā whakaahua mata, me ngā whakaahua hua.
press.scanTip: Kei rorohiko papamahi? Tātarihia mā tō waea hei tiki i te taupānga.

careers.title: Ngā mahi
careers.intro: He rōpū kaihanga iti mātou e hanga ana i a Chatforia — he karere tūmataiti ā-ao e whakarewahia ana ki te paetukutuku, iOS, me Android. Mēnā he mea nui ki a koe te tūmataiti, te whakamunatanga, me ngā wheako kaiwhakamahi whakamīharo, ka tino koa mātou ki te rongo i a koe.
careers.openRoles: Ngā tūranga kaihanga e wātea ana: Kaihanga Pūnaha-whānui Matua, Kaihanga Pūnaha-muri (Node.js), Kaihanga Pātengi/Tukutuku (React), Kaihanga Pūkoro (iOS), Kaihanga Pūkoro (Android), DevOps/SRE, Kaihanga Haumarutanga me te Whakamunatanga, Kaihanga Whakawhitiwhiti Waea (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Me pēhea te tono: Whakamahia te pātene i raro nei ki te īmēra i tō CV me ō hononga.
careers.whyNow: He aha te take kia uru ināianei?
careers.whyBullets:
• Awhina ki te hanga i te tūāpapa o tētahi karere ā-ao hou.
• Whakaputa i ngā whakahou e whakamahia ana puta noa i te paetukutuku, iOS, me Android.
• Mahi tika ki te kaiwhakatū mō te hanganga me te aronga hua.
• Whai mana ki ngā wāhanga whai pānga nui o te pūnaha: karere, reo, ataata, whakamuna, whakawhitiwhiti, AI. n• Hono mai i te tīmatanga — i mua i te pikinga ake o te hunga kaiwhakamahi.

advertise.description: Whai wāhi ki ngā kaiwhakamahi karere kua ū ki te whakamahi, mā ngā whakanoho ātaahua, haumaru hoki mō tō waitohu. Ka tukuna e mātou ngā pānui whakatairanga i ngā wāhi tino kitea, ngā tautoko, me ngā whakatairanga ā-whare. Kāore ngā ohaurunga Premium e kite i ngā pānui.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Ngā pārongo e kohia ana e mātou
infoWeCollect.account: Ngā pārongo pūkete (hei tauira, īmēra/waea) hei waihanga, hei whakamarumaru i tō pūkete.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Kua whakamunatia ngā ihirangi (karere/waea) mai i te tīmatanga ki te mutunga; kāore e taea e mātou te pānui.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Ngā tātari/whakamahinga pērā i ngā rangitaki pakaru, te momo pūrere, me ngā tātaritanga whānui hei whakapai ake i te mahinga.

sms.title: Ngā nama waea pūkoro me ngā SMS
sms.body:
Mēnā ka whiriwhiri koe ki te tuku nama waea pūkoro, ka whakamahia e mātou hei whakahohe i ngā āhuatanga pērā i te whakamana pūkete, ngā whakamōhiotanga takiuru, me te tuku karere ā-kaiwhakamahi mā SMS i ngā wā e tautokohia ana. Ka taea e mātou te tuku karere SMS whakawhitinga e pā ana ki tō pūkete me ō mahi i runga i Chatforia. Ka taea e koe te whakakore i te whiwhi karere SMS i ngā wā katoa mā te whakahoki mai i tētahi kupu matua whakakore tautokohia (pērā i te "STOP") rānei mā te whakarerekē i ō whiringa whakamōhiotanga i roto i te taupānga. Kāore mātou
 hoko i tō nama waea, whakamahi rānei mō ngā hokohoko kāore e hāngai ana.

howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Tiritiri
sharing.body: Kāore mātou e hoko i ngā raraunga whaiaro. Tērā pea ka tiritiri mātou i ētahi raraunga iti ki ngā kaiwhakahaere (hei tauira, ngā pānui pana, ngā tātaritanga) i raro i ngā kirimana mārō.

rights.title: Āu mana
rights.body: I runga i tō rohe (hei tauira, GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ka taea e koe te tono uru, whakatika, te muku, te whakakore rānei i ētahi tukanga. Whakapā mai: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Ngā tamariki
children.body: Ehara a Chatforia i te mea mō ngā tamariki i raro i te 13 tau (rānei, pēnei i ngā whakaritenga a tō ture ā-rohe).

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: At Chatforia, we strive to provide a high-quality service to all users. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You may cancel at any time through your account settings or the platform used to purchase.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted for duplicate charges, billing errors, or technical issues preventing access to paid features. All requests are reviewed case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable
nonRefundable.body: We generally do not provide refunds for unused time, partial subscription periods, or failure to cancel before renewal.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Purchases
thirdParty.body: If purchased through third-party platforms such as the Apple App Store, refunds must be requested directly through those platforms.

doNotSell.title: Kaua e Hokona, e Tiritiri rānei i ōku Mōhiohio Whaiaro
doNotSell.body: Kāore a Chatforia e hoko i ngā mōhiohio whaiaro. Ka taea tonu e ngā kainoho o California te tuku tono i raro i te CPRA mā te pātene kei raro nei.

cookies.title: Tautuhinga Kuki
cookies.body: Ka whakamahi a Chatforia i ngā kuki iti rawa (hei tauira, wāhanga, haumaru). Kāore mātou e whakamahi i ngā pihikete pānui a ētahi atu. Whakahaerehia ngā pihikete mā ngā tautuhinga o tō pūtirotiro.

whatWeSend.title: Ngā mea e tukuna ana e mātou
whatWeSend.body: Ka tukuna e Chatforia ngā SMS e pā ana ki te pūkete me ngā kōrero anake ki ngā nama waea kua whakaratoa ā-tūturu e te kaiwhakamahi, ā, kua whakaae ia. Ko ngā karere noa iho he waehere takiuru/whakamana, ngā whakamōhiotanga tuku karere, ngā pānui haumaru, me ngā whakahou pūkete whakawhitinga.

optIn.body: Ka whakaae ngā kaiwhakamahi mā te whakauru i tō rātou nama waea i te wā rēhitatanga, ā, mā te tohu i te pouaka tirotiro whakaaetanga SMS kei te whārangi rēhitatanga, kei te puka motuhake rānei
